fields.description:
ABOUT THE TEAM

At OpenAI, we are dedicated to building safe artificial general intelligence (AGI) that benefits all of humanity. Achieving this mission requires hiring extraordinary talent across research, engineering, product, policy, operations, and leadership roles. The Recruiting team sits at the center of this effort, responsible for identifying, attracting, and delivering world-class candidates who align with OpenAI’s values and ambitions.

The Candidate Experience team ensures that every interaction a candidate has with OpenAI—regardless of role, region, or level—reflects excellence, fairness, and humanity. This team owns global coordination, interview logistics, onsite experience, and the operational workflows that support all recruiting functions, from Executive and Research to Technical, GTM, and G&A.The Candidate Experience team supports a wide range of hiring modalities—from executive and research to high-volume technical roles—and we need someone who understands how to adapt across them. As OpenAI scales globally, this team plays a critical role in designing experiences that are both bespoke for highly specialized searches and scalable across rapidly growing teams and offices.


ABOUT THE ROLE

As the Global Candidate Experience, Senior Manager, you will define, scale, and continuously elevate how candidates experience OpenAI. You will lead a large, geographically distributed team of Recruiting Coordinators and team leads, with responsibility for the systems, workflows, and service standards that enable smooth and exceptional hiring across the entire company.

This role blends global people leadership, operational rigor, and strategic design. You’ll build an AI-first candidate experience model, support some of the most complex and confidential searches at OpenAI, and drive the infrastructure needed to support high-volume and research-level technical hiring. You will partner deeply with all Recruiting functions as well as Executive Operations, People Analytics, Internal Tools, and People Innovation Lab.

The ideal candidate has led substantial coordination or recruiting operations teams, scaled programs across multiple offices or countries, and thrives in environments where bespoke workflows and scalable infrastructure must coexist.


IN THIS ROLE YOU WILL:

 - Leading, mentoring, and scaling a global team of Recruiting Coordinators, leads and contingent workers across multiple regions and time zones.

 - A track record of driving outcomes—not just managing teams—with clear ownership over performance, quality, and operational results.

 - Owning the end-to-end candidate experience across Executive, Research, Technical, GTM, and G&A hiring.

 - Building global service standards, SLAs, operating rhythms, and training programs that ensure consistent quality across a decentralized team.

 - Partnering closely with every Recruiting function at OpenAI to support high-impact, highly confidential, and fast-moving searches.

 - Building global workflows and systems for complex, multi-loop, or emerging talent profiles where no existing playbook exists.

 - Improving and operationalizing scheduling, load balancing, shadowing, interviewer readiness, and onsite experience programs.

 - Collaborating with Internal Tools and People Technology Team to embed AI-first practices into every aspect of coordination and experience.

 - Driving continuous process improvements that reduce friction, increase fairness, and scale effectively with company growth.

 - Establishing and reporting on key metrics such as SLA performance, throughput, scheduling efficiency, load distribution, and candidate CSAT.

 - Partnering cross-functionally with Executive Operations, People Analytics, Workplace, IT, HR Ops, and Recruiting Leadership to ensure fast, smooth execution across all hiring workflows.


YOU WILL THRIVE IN THIS ROLE IS YOU HAVE:

 - 12+ years of experience in recruiting coordination, candidate experience, or recruiting operations.

 - 5+ years managing and developing large, globally distributed coordination or operations teams.

 - Experience supporting and partnering with Executive, Research, and Technical Recruiting teams.

 - Proven ability to design and operate both bespoke, high-touch candidate journeys and scalable global processes.

 - Strong proficiency with modern recruiting tools — experience with Ashby and Guide is a strong plus.

 - A systems-thinking mindset with the ability to build clarity and structure in fast-paced, ambiguous environments.

 - Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to influence across functions and levels.

 - Comfort experimenting with AI-driven tooling and workflows to increase efficiency and quality.

 - Deep empathy and a commitment to fairness, consistency, and exceptional candidate care.

Workplace & Location
This role is based in our San Francisco office and we aren’t considering remote applications at this time. We offer relocation support to new employees, and we use a hybrid work model: three days in the office per week with optional work from home on Thursdays and Fridays.

Our open-plan offices have height-adjustable desks, conference rooms, phone booths, well-stocked kitchens full of snacks and drinks, three in-house prepared meals daily, a private outdoor space for working in the sun or socializing, nap rooms, private bike storage, and more.

About OpenAI

OpenAI is an AI research and deployment company dedicated to ensuring that general-purpose artificial intelligence benefits all of humanity. We push the boundaries of the capabilities of AI systems and seek to safely deploy them to the world through our products. AI is an extremely powerful tool that must be created with safety and human needs at its core, and to achieve our mission, we must encompass and value the many different perspectives, voices, and experiences that form the full spectrum of humanity. 

We are an equal opportunity employer, and we do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, age, veteran status, disability, genetic information, or other applicable legally protected characteristic.

For additional information, please see OpenAI’s Affirmative Action and Equal Employment Opportunity Policy Statement https://cdn.openai.com/policies/eeo-policy-statement.pdf.

Background checks for applicants will be administered in accordance with applicable law, and qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records will be considered for employment consistent with those laws, including the San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance, the Los Angeles County Fair Chance Ordinance for Employers, and the California Fair Chance Act, for US-based candidates. For unincorporated Los Angeles County workers: we reasonably believe that criminal history may have a direct, adverse and negative relationship with the following job duties, potentially resulting in the withdrawal of a conditional offer of employment: protect computer hardware entrusted to you from theft, loss or damage; return all computer hardware in your possession (including the data contained therein) upon termination of employment or end of assignment; and maintain the confidentiality of proprietary, confidential, and non-public information. In addition, job duties require access to secure and protected information technology systems and related data security obligations.

To notify OpenAI that you believe this job posting is non-compliant, please submit a report through this form https://form.asana.com/?d=57018692298241&k=5MqR40fZd7jlxVUh5J-UeA. No response will be provided to inquiries unrelated to job posting compliance.

We are committed to providing reasonable accommodations to applicants with disabilities, and requests can be made via this link https://form.asana.com/?k=bQ7w9h3iexRlicUdWRiwvg&d=57018692298241.

OpenAI Global Applicant Privacy Policy https://cdn.openai.com/policies/global-employee-and-contractor-privacy-policy.pdf

At OpenAI, we believe artificial intelligence has the potential to help people solve immense global challenges, and we want the upside of AI to be widely shared. Join us in shaping the future of technology.
fields.title: Global Candidate Experience, Senior Manager
